title: orthochilus dichromus
intro: Orthochilus dichromus, also known as the two-colored orchid, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The roots of the Orthochilus dichromus plant are believed to possess health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in reducing swelling and preventing infections. In herbal preparations, the roots are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
